case_title: ZYGMUNT DRAB VS. CHERYL POWER et al

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-22-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRAB, ZYGMUNT HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-07-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ZYGMUNT DRAB'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Aug-22-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Cheryl Power, present. No appearance by or on behal of Plaintiff. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/22/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
